rationale: ThreadState is a tagged union the spec discriminates on, so the view mirrors the variant structure exactly. vaddr is a spec nat used as an address key — kept by value. PTE has no resolved view yet, so we project it through `@` (and Option<PTE> through Option's blanket View impl), recording PTE as a dependency for recursive synthesis.
critic_issues: Assumes PTE implements View and Option<PTE>@ has the expected Option<<PTE as View>::V> shape; dependency view was not resolved in the provided context.
